quotes.text: Batch your shallow work. Protect your deep work. Ignore everything else.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The ability to perform deep work is becoming increasingly rare at exactly the same time it is becoming increasingly valuable.
quotes.author: Cal Newport

quotes.text: Your most important work requires deep focus. Protect it like your life depends on it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to do deep work is to eliminate all distractions. Phone off. Slack closed. Door shut.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best deep work happens when you're well-rested, not when you're tired. Sleep is productivity.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Deep work is not about working harder. It's about working on the right things with full attention.
quotes.author: based
